calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Continued To Jul-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Continued To Mar-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore telephone number 510-482-2158 specially appearing for Plaintiff.

Ms. Bates-Moore stated that a proof of service was contained in the packet of documents. The Court explained that the documents that were electronically filed with the Court do not contain proof of service. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT is continued to March 7, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Counsel is to re-serve the opposing party.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
